name: Milk Thistle Silybum marianum
summary: Milk Thistle centers on the seed; fruit.
description: Milk Thistle centers on the seed; fruit. Key reported compounds include silybin A/B; isosilybin A/B; silychristin; silydianin; isosilychristin.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
interactions: clinically significant interactions not well established

sources.title: Milk thistle (Silybum marianum): A concise overview on its chemistry, pharmacological, and nutraceutical uses in liver diseases
